'''Notsub Security''' was a division of the [[Notsub Shipping Company]], and was the largest private security firm in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. It was [[Notsub Security headquarters|headquartered]] on the northern edge of the city.<ref name="GG7" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-01-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' {{1stm}}
